Tournaments Paper Trading

Compete for real prize pools based on artist performance. Reserve your spot now — tournaments go live at launch.

All Tournaments

Your Tournaments

Tournament History ?All tournaments you've participated in. Results are kept permanently.

How Tournaments Work

1
Reserve your spot
Pay the entry fee in tournament credits. Your spot is locked in.
2
Build your portfolio
When the tournament starts, pick your artists and allocate weights. Picks lock at kickoff.
3
Track real data
Prices update via the Muses price model — Spotify monthly listeners and YouTube views, refreshed every 30 minutes.
4
Win credit payouts
Top finishers split the credits prize pool. 85% of all entry credits go directly to prizes.

How payouts work
85% of entry credits go to the prize pool; the remaining 15% covers platform operating costs. ?All entries and payouts are in virtual tournament credits — no real money is involved. Winners are paid within 24 hours of the tournament ending.

How Swaps Work

1. Pick an artist you hold (sell side)

2. Pick the artist you want (buy side)

3. Set the amount — we sell and buy in one go
